CVE-2023-34411.title: The xml-rs crate before 0.8.14 for Rust and Crab allows a denial  ...
CVE-2023-34411.summary: The xml-rs crate before 0.8.14 for Rust and Crab allows a denial of service (panic) via an invalid <! token (such as <!DOCTYPEs/%<!A nesting) in an XML document. The earliest affected version is 0.8.9.
